title: Digital D&D Character Sheet
description: Interactive desktop tool for managing Dungeons & Dragons character sheets, built in WPF as a modular, real-time editing system.

The application replaces traditional static character sheets with a dynamic digital interface designed to reduce in-game friction. It combines character stats, inventory, and session notes into a unified workspace optimized for fast updates during gameplay.

A key design focus was flexibility and extensibility, including class-specific UI behavior, multiple editing modes (safe bulk editing, modal item editing, and notes management), and support for homebrew content.
The system is built using a modular architecture with independent WPF User Controls and event-driven updates, enabling scalable UI expansion and maintainability.
